binds.increaseOffset: Ajustar offset de los subtítulos en +100ms

videoDataSync.loadSubtitlesFirst: Deben cargarse los subtítulos antes de comenzar a minar
videoDataSync.failedToAutoLoad: Could not auto-load subtitles in your preferred language.
videoDataSync.rememberTrackPreference: Recordar estas opciones de pista para este sitio
videoDataSync.ftue: Auto-detected subtitle tracks can be selected here. asbplayer does not know how to detect subtitles on every site. You can always load your own subtitle files.

videoSelect.selectVideo: Selecciona un elemento de video para sincronizar con asbplayer.
videoSelect.syncBeforeMine: Un elemento de video debe ser sincronizado con asbplayer antes de que pueda ser minado. Selecciona un elemento de video a sincronizar con asbplayer.

ftue.welcomeBody2: Scroll down for a quick intro, or check out the <0>user guide</0>.
ftue.toolbar: Click the 🧩 icon in the toolbar, and select <0>asbplayer</0> to open the asbplayer <1>Popup</1>.<2/>Use the 📌 button to pin asbplayer to the toolbar for easy access.
ftue.sidePanel: Use the <0>Side Panel</0> to <1>navigate</1> between subtitles, <2>mine</2> subtitles, and more.
ftue.overlayScroll: <0>Scroll</0> the rightmost control to switch between <1>subtitle navigation</1>, <2>subtitle offset</2>, and <3>playback rate</3> controls.
ftue.overlay: Use the <0>Video Overlay</0> to <1>mine</1> and <2>toggle</2> subtitles, <3>switch playback modes</3>, and more.
ftue.congrats: That's it for the basics! Feel free to play around on this page.
ftue.loadSubtitles: The first step to using asbplayer is always to load subtitles onto a video. Use the <0>Side Panel</0> to load subtitles onto the video on this page.<1/>Hint: The <2>Side Panel</2> can be accessed through the <3>Popup</3>.
ftue.loadSubtitlesFirefox: The first step to using asbplayer is always to load subtitles onto a video. <0>Right-click</0> on the video and find the asbplayer <1>context menu</1> to load subtitles.
ftue.loadSubtitlesMobile: The first step to using asbplayer is always to load subtitles onto a video. Open the track selector by selecting <0>asbplayer</0> in the <1>extensions</1> menu.
ftue.ankiConnectError: Once you've opened Anki and installed AnkiConnect, clicking the ⟳ button should make the error go away.
ftue.deck: Select the <0>Deck</0> where you want your cards to go.
ftue.defaultDeck: If you don't have any decks yet, you can <0>create the default one</0>.
ftue.anki: <0>Anki</0> is the most popular flashcard program in the world. It uses an algorithm called <1>SRS</1> to make learning information very efficient.
ftue.ankiDialog: Use the <0>Anki Export Dialog</0> to create Anki flashcards. In most cases, asbplayer can fill out <1>sentence</1>, <2>image</2>, and <3>audio</3> automatically.
ftue.configureAnki: Click here to configure asbplayer's integration with Anki.
ftue.ankiDialogDefinition: Put any details you want to remember about the sentence in the <0>Definition Field</0>.
ftue.ankiDialogDefinitionHint: Hint: A dictionary extension like <0>Yomitan</0> makes this really easy.
ftue.noteType: Select the <0>Note Type</0> for your cards. The <1>Note Type</1> determines how the front and back of your cards will look.
ftue.defaultNoteType: If you don't have any note types yet, you can <0>create the default one</0>.
ftue.ankiFields: The rest of the drop-downs configure how content gets mapped into fields of your card.
ftue.testCard: When ready, you can create a test card to see how it looks.

update.heading: asbplayer acaba de actualizarse a la versión {{version}}.
update.alert: asbplayer se actualizó a la versión {{version}}. Revisa las notas <0>aquí</0>.

landing.videoElementsDetected: Carga subtítulos a un video para comenzar a usar asbplayer

activeTabPermissionRequest.title: Habilitar grabación de audio

activeTabPermissionRequest.grantedPrompt: Grabación de audio habilitada para esta pestaña. Puedes empezar a minar.

audioCaptureFailed.message: El audio protegido por DRM no puede ser capturado en la versión para Firefox de asbplayer.

settings.alwaysPlayOnSubtitleRepeat: Siempre reproducir luego de invocar "Ir al inicio del subtítulo actual/anterior"
settings.audioPaddingEnd: Retraso del final de la grabación de audio
settings.audioPaddingStart: Adelanto del inicio de la grabación de audio
settings.autoCopy: Copiar automáticamente el subtítulo actual al portapapeles
settings.autoPausePreferenceHelperText: No activa el pausado automático. Establece cuando pausar si el pausado automático está activado.
settings.speedChangeStep: Magnitud del ajuste de velocidad de reproducción
settings.corsHelperText: Asegúrate de que {{origin}} esté en webCorsOriginList en tu configuración de AnkiConnect como en este <0>video</0>.
settings.extensionShortcut: Atajo de teclado de la extensión
settings.imageBasedSubtitleScaleFactor: Factor de Escalado para Subtítulos Basados en Imágenes
settings.miningHistoryStorageLimit: Límite de almacenamiento del historial de minado
settings.clickToMineDefaultAction: Acción por defecto del botón de minado
settings.preCacheSubtitleDomHelperText: Si está activado, asbplayer renderizará los elementos de texto del subtítulo en un elemento fuera de pantalla, y reusará estos elementos para mostrar los subtítulos. Esto permite a código externo modifique persistentemente el texto del subtítulo antes de que se muestre.
settings.subtitleBackgroundColor: Color del Fondo de los Subtítulos
settings.subtitleBackgroundOpacity: Opacidad del Fondo de los Subtítulos
settings.subtitleFontFamily: Familia de Fuente de los Subtítulos
settings.subtitleOutlineColor: Color del Contorno de los Subtítulos
settings.subtitleOutlineThickness: Grosor del Contorno de los Subtítulos
settings.subtitleShadowColor: Color de la Sombra de los Subtítulos
settings.subtitleShadowThickness: Grosor del Sombreado de los Subtítulos
settings.subtitleOutlineThicknessHelperText: Agrega un contorno al texto de los subtítulos. Si esto causa líneas superpuestas, trata de usar otra fuente.
settings.subtitlePositionOffset: Distancia de los subtítulos desde el borde inferior
settings.subtitleTrackSelectorHelper: Changes settings for ALL tracks. Settings that already have track-specific values are hidden.
settings.subtitleBlurDescription: Oculta las pistas de subtítulos seleccionadas desenfocándolas. Pueden enfocarse nuevamente al pasar el ratón por encima.
settings.subtitleRegexFilterTextReplacement: Texto de reemplazo para el filtro regex
settings.subtitleThickness: Grosor de la Fuente de los Subtítulos
settings.surroundingSubtitlesCountRadius: Radio de Cantidad de Subtítulos Circundantes
settings.tagsHelperText: Lista de strings separados por coma
settings.title: Ajustes
settings.unlockLocalFonts: Haz click para desbloquear el menú de fuentes
settings.missingFieldError: Field "{{field}}" not found in note type
settings.firefoxExtensionShortcutHelp: Edita este acceso directo desde el gestor de plugins en about:addons.
settings.ftueAnnotation: Subtitle annotation features are now available.
settings.annotationNoExtensionWarn: Installing the asbplayer extension is recommended to prevent your browser from deleting manually stored words. Export your settings before installing the extension to preserve your data.
settings.annotationLocalAnkiHelperText: Word status is determined by your local collection then from Anki cards. Collect words locally through imports or by hovering over words and using the keyboard shortcuts.
settings.buildAnkiCacheHelperText: The cache is automatically updated during playback when a track is enabled and Anki is connectable.
settings.buildAnkiCacheAnkiEnableHelperText: Configure word fields and/or sentence fields to use Anki for known words.
settings.ankiCacheDependentSettingsHelperText: Changing "{{field}}" could invalidate the Anki cache, trigger a rebuild now or have it done automatically on your next playback when this track is enabled and Anki is connectable.
settings.dictionaryColorizeSubtitles: Colorize subtitles based on known words
settings.dictionaryYomitanMecabNotSupportedError: Failed to parse with MeCab, instructions to setup are <0>here</0>. Install UniDic for the best results.
settings.dictionaryYomitanMecabLemmaNotSupportedE: Update to the latest MeCab installer <0>here</0> and install UniDic for the best results.
settings.dictionaryTokenStylingOutlineHelperText: You may need to set Subtitle Outline Thickness in Subtitle Appearance to 0 for the best results.
settings.dictionaryBuildYomitanError: Error connecting to Yomitan for track {{trackNumber}} (disable this track to ignore)
settings.dictionaryImportClipboardText: Paste text or one word per line
settings.yomitanHelperText: Instructions to setup Yomitan API are <0>here<0>.

statistics.title: Statistics
statistics.description: Generate and review vocabulary statistics for the current sentence collection.
statistics.empty: No statistics have been generated for the current sentences yet.
statistics.gettingStarted: To generate statistics for loaded subtitles, enable annotations from the <0>settings</1>.
statistics.miningDisabledUntilComplete: Mining is available after statistics for this track finish generating.
statistics.noMoreRewatches: There will be no more mining after all i+1 sentences this session.

anki.ankiNeedsToBeRunning: Anki needs to be running to load statistics.
anki.noDeckBreakdown: No matching Anki cards were found for this media.

info.ankiStatistics: How your Anki cards match up with the words in this media.

info.comprehension: How many unique words are known, weighted by status and occurrences.
info.globalKnownWords: How many words are known including locally stored words and Anki.
info.wordDistribution: How unique words are distributed across status and frequency.
info.frequency: Frequency: The rank-based frequency from your frequency dictionaries.
info.occurrences: Occurrences: The total number of times a word appears.
info.sentenceStatistics: How easily this content can be mined.
info.projectedRewatch: Assumes all i+1 uncollected sentences were mined from the previous watch.
